items.name_en: Platinum Edition▪️Genuine Quality Packaging as shown
items.name_cn:
Platinum Edition▪️Genuine Quality Packaging as shown
Chanel CF Small Beige
Full name Classic Flap
Size: Small 23*14.5*6cm
Material: Original Factory Haas fine ball Caviar
Hardware: 24K Light Gold Plating
The classic CF has a charm that makes people fall in love at first sight. It is a moving elegant label wherever you go. The pure white exudes an elegant and gentle goddess vibe. Paired with a gold buckle, it is exquisite and luxurious, truly a luxury entry-level choice everyone should see~

items.name_en: P🆕【Premium Original】🔥【Exclusive Background】🌈Elephant Print
items.name_cn:
P🆕【Premium Original】🔥【Exclusive Background】🌈Elephant Print
New Elephant Print NIKai Front Flap Bag, accented with metal LE CASSANDRE, featuring convertible leather and chain shoulder straps. The popular NIKI Elephant Print is a favorite among many stars and influencers, hard to find in stores. The globally popular NIKI features a large capacity and elephant print cowhide! The craftsmanship is very complex, offering you a unique visual effect! An absolute must-have style!👑
Model: 633178
Size: 28X20X8.5cm

items.name_en: Pochette Accessoires Series M82766 Uninspected Version
items.name_cn:
Pochette Accessoires Series M82766 Uninspected Version
❒ Size: 23.5*13.5*4cm ❒
A classic adaptation of the Mahjong bag, retaining the original style with a simple and elegant look. The portable carrying method and upgraded capacity meet the storage needs for essential items while traveling. Includes an extra internal pocket!
Small and lightweight, the chain strap design is eye-catching. A truly legendary piece!
Another blockbuster from the Fa Bao series; the design is truly top-tier!

items.name_cn:
POCHETTE FELICIE Three-piece set bag chain M69977 Elephant Grey 80482 Black 81759 Pink Print 82047 Cream Strawberry
